overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing the player walking through a narrow corridor lined with magazine posters, entering a street market stall under an overpass, and approaching a vendor. The scene transitions from a dimly lit interior to a bright, sunlit open-air market area with industrial architecture and scattered pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow corridor with magazine poster display

events.description: approaching the open doorway with bright daylight visible through the entrance

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow corridor, passing colorful magazine posters mounted on the left wall

entered.detail: Wall covered with colorful magazine covers and advertisements in metal frames
Industrial metal rack holding the magazine displays and posters
Open doorway leading to brightly lit exterior market area
Industrial corrugated metal walling with vertical ridges

segments.scene_description: The player walks through a narrow, dimly lit corridor lined with magazine posters on the left wall. The industrial metal walls and shelving create a confined space, while bright daylight streams in from an open doorway ahead, signaling the transition to an exterior area.

scene_state.functional_zone: entry corridor of a street market stall

events.description: exiting the narrow corridor into the covered market stall area
slowing down while approaching a character standing in the doorway

agents.ego_description: walking through the doorway into the market stall, approaching a character in a yellow shirt standing in the entrance

notable_agents.action: character wearing a yellow shirt with logo standing in the doorway, facing toward the interior

entered.detail: Overhead metal covering of the market stall with fluorescent tube lighting
Plastic bins and metal containers stacked along the right wall of the stall
Perforated metal flooring transitioning from the corridor to the stall interior

segments.scene_description: The player exits the narrow corridor into a covered market stall area with industrial metal construction. A character in a yellow shirt stands in the doorway ahead as the camera approaches, while storage containers and overhead fluorescent lights become visible in the semi-enclosed space.

scene_state.functional_zone: street food market stall under urban overpass

events.description: moving into the open-air portion of the stall with full view of the street and overpass
pedestrians begin walking past the stall entrance in the background street

agents.ego_description: moving around inside the market stall, observing the vendor at the counter and watching street activity beyond

notable_agents.action: vendor seated at a table inside the stall, facing the entrance and street
pedestrian in colorful clothing walking past the stall entrance on the street

entered.detail: Massive concrete pillars and beams of the urban overpass visible beyond the stall
Long metal table with various bottles, containers, and items where the vendor sits
Illuminated displays and electronic signs on the right side of the stall interior
Open urban street visible beyond the stall with buildings and pedestrian traffic

segments.scene_description: Inside the market stall, the player explores the space around a counter where a vendor sits. The stall opens toward a sunlit street under a massive concrete overpass, with neon signage visible on the walls. Pedestrians occasionally walk past the entrance as the camera pans to observe the street activity and industrial architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a confined, dimly lit interior into a bright, bustling open-air market. It begins by navigating a narrow corridor lined with magazine posters and industrial metal walls, moving toward a distant glow of daylight. As the camera exits the hallway, the space opens into a covered market stall where overhead fluorescent lights illuminate storage containers and a figure in a yellow shirt. The scene then shifts further into the stall, passing a vendor's counter before expanding toward a sunlit street beneath a massive concrete overpass. Finally, the camera pans across the industrial architecture and neon signage to observe pedestrians walking through the vibrant outdoor plaza.
